scripts.build: npm run build:root && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-utils && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-frontend-developer && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-registry && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-swift-developer && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-coordinator
scripts.test: npm run build:root && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-utils && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-frontend-developer && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-registry && npm run test --workspace @appverk/opencode-swift-developer
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run build --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-utils && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-utils && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-python-developer && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-code-review && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-frontend-developer && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-skill-registry && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-swift-developer && npm run typecheck --workspace @appverk/opencode-coordinator
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
